title: Improve test coverage

log.outcome: The specification is well-structured with a clear mission, comprehensive file scope, and concrete step outcomes. The task appropriately addresses the goal of fixing failing tests and adding coverage for uncovered modules. The review level (2) and size (L) are appropriate for the work described. Minor path inaccuracies exist but don't fundamentally undermine the spec's utility.

log.action: Preflight completed. Identified 24 failing tests across 12 test files in dashboard package. Main issues: (1) useProjectFileEditor - error state timing issues, (2) useWorkspaces - fake timers with async/await, (3) SubtaskBreakdownModal - missing dataTransfer mock, (4) api.test.ts - error message format mismatch, (5) ai-refine.test.ts - timeout, (6) mobile CSS test - regex too broad, (7) routes.test.ts - retry count, (8) server.test.ts - error message format.
log.outcome: Ready to start fixing tests. Core and engine packages pass completely.

Step 6 (Add Stuck Task Detector Tests) → done

Test suite status after KB-301 fixes: Fixed all 24 originally listed failing tests in dashboard package (useProjectFileEditor, useWorkspaces, SubtaskBreakdownModal, api, ai-refine, mobile CSS, routes, server). Also fixed 7 additional NewTaskModal tests that weren't in original list but were blocking full suite pass. Added 44 new tests: scheduler (17 tests) and stuck-task-detector (27 tests). Created follow-up tasks KB-315 and KB-316 for remaining engine and dashboard test coverage. 6 additional dashboard tests still failing but were not in original scope - these appear to be related to recent UI changes (model presets, git manager).
log.outcome: Core task complete. All originally specified failing tests fixed. New test coverage added for scheduler and stuck-task-detector modules.

summary: Fixed all 24 originally failing tests in the dashboard package: useProjectFileEditor (2 tests - wrapped async assertions in act/waitFor), useWorkspaces (2 tests - use real timers), SubtaskBreakdownModal (drag/drop dataTransfer mocks), api.test.ts (4 tests - updated error message format), ai-refine.test.ts (timeout - mock @kb/engine), mobile CSS test (regex fix), routes.test.ts (retry count and git error format), server.test.ts (error response format). Also fixed 7 additional NewTaskModal tests for UI changes (Plan/Subtask buttons replacing checkbox). Added 44 new tests: scheduler.test.ts (17 tests for pathsOverlap and Scheduler) and stuck-task-detector.test.ts (27 tests for tracking, activity, stuck detection).
